Metadata.title: Aleo Hackathon | Build Programmable Privacy
Metadata.description: The Aleo x OpenBuild Hackathon invites builders across APAC to compete in five tracks for a $5,000 prize pool and create the next generation of privacy-first applications.
Metadata.ogTitle: The Aleo Hackathon Is Now Open
Metadata.ogDescription: Five tracks, five winning projects, and a $5,000 prize pool. Join the Aleo Hackathon and build the next generation of programmable privacy applications.

hero.title: Aleo Hackathon
hero.lead: We are looking for builders creating the next generation of privacy-first applications—from AI agents and private payments to DeFi and developer infrastructure.
hero.body: If you believe the next generation of the internet needs privacy and user-owned data alongside openness and transparency, now is the time to build in the Aleo ecosystem.

apply.title: Open to builders across APAC.
apply.body: Whether you are an experienced blockchain developer or new to Aleo, you are welcome to participate if you are excited about building in privacy, AI, payments, DeFi, gaming, social applications, or infrastructure.

tracksSection.title: 5 Tracks · 5 Winning Projects
tracksSection.body: One winning project will be selected from each track and awarded $1,000.

tracks.title: AI × Privacy Track
tracks.summary: Combine AI with privacy-preserving computation to build intelligent tools that protect user data and data sovereignty by design.

tracks.title: Private Payments Track
tracks.summary: Build the next generation of private payment applications so transactions, payroll, and cross-border settlements do not expose sensitive financial data.

tracks.title: Private DeFi Track
tracks.summary: Bring privacy to DeFi and create on-chain financial products that are confidential, secure, and cryptographically verifiable.

tracks.title: Infrastructure & Developer Tools Track
tracks.summary: Build core infrastructure for the Aleo ecosystem and make programmable privacy easier for developers to adopt, integrate, and ship.

tracks.title: GameFi & SocialFi Track
tracks.summary: Create privacy-first games and social applications where users retain control over their identity, reputation, and interactions.

scheduleSection.title: Hackathon Timeline
scheduleSection.body: Move from registration and project submission to Demo Day with a focus on validating the product and delivering meaningful privacy features.

schedule.detail: Register, define your project scope, and begin development.
Teams must complete project submission before the deadline.
Present your project online to the community, mentors, and Aleo ecosystem partners.
Winning projects are announced. High-potential teams may also receive ecosystem support, community exposure, incubation opportunities, and investor introductions.

about.title: What Is Aleo?
about.paragraph1: Aleo is the first Layer 1 blockchain purpose-built for programmable privacy. Using zero-knowledge proofs, Aleo enables developers to build applications that protect user data while remaining verifiable on-chain.
about.paragraph2: Developers can build privacy-preserving applications in Leo without becoming experts in the underlying cryptography. As AI becomes embedded in more products, private computation will be a foundational capability for the next generation of applications.

benefits: Technical support from the Aleo core team

whatWeWant.title: What Should You Build?
whatWeWant.body: We are looking for more than a technical demo. Build a product that solves a real problem, applies privacy in a meaningful way, and has a credible path to real users.

whoCanJoin.title: Built for Multidisciplinary Teams
whoCanJoin.body: No prior Aleo experience is required. You can learn the stack and start building during the hackathon.

cta.eyebrow: Build the Future of Programmable Privacy
cta.title: Privacy should not be a feature. It should be the default.
cta.body: Join the Aleo Hackathon and build the future of private computation alongside developers from across APAC.
cta.footer: Build the Future of Programmable Privacy.
